evidence.quote: The release includes T1w anatomical scans, resting-state fMRI, and task fMRI runs related to scientific creativity and verbal creativity.

diseases.needs: Participant health/diagnostic status page (e.g. participants.tsv or a phenotype/methods section) — not stated in the evidence, which only lists task names (creativity/rest paradigms), not a clinical or control-population designation.

region.needs: Institution/site location metadata (e.g. dataset_description.json Institution field or paper affiliations) — no country, city or institution is stated in the evidence.

years.needs: Data collection/acquisition date range (e.g. dataset_description.json or paper Methods) — the evidence only gives a dataset upload timestamp ("Created: 2026-06-28T15:33:11.402Z"), not the years scanning actually took place.

species.needs: Explicit species declaration (e.g. dataset_description.json or Methods) — the evidence never states "human" verbatim; it is implied by MRI/participants language but not asserted.

cost.needs: Explicit cost/terms-of-use statement — the evidence gives the license (CC0) but never states the data are free of charge.

evidence.quote: This OpenNeuro copy is a public, defaced release derived from the project BIDS directory.

access_notes.value: This OpenNeuro copy is a public, defaced release derived from the project BIDS directory.

evidence.quote: This OpenNeuro copy is a public, defaced release derived from the project BIDS directory.

short_desc_en.value: Task fMRI dataset on scientific creativity with a matched experimental control condition, shared openly on OpenNeuro under a CC0 license.

evidence.quote: task-SCT: Scientific Creativity Task, including hypothesis generation and a matched control condition.

short_desc_es.value: Dataset de fMRI de tarea sobre creatividad científica con una condición de control experimental emparejada, compartido abiertamente en OpenNeuro bajo licencia CC0.

evidence.quote: task-SCT: Scientific Creativity Task, including hypothesis generation and a matched control condition.
